item.title:
philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 7min Here's the World Snooker Championship draw.
Zhao Xintong kicks off against Liam Highfield
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 7min Here's the World Snooker Championship draw.
Zhao Xintong kicks off against Liam Highfield.
Ronnie O'Sullivan has debutant He Guoqiang.
Kyren Wilson vs Stan Moody is nice.
All the details here De metro.co.uk 1 1 154
